ddls:
CREATE TABLE "iris_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "sepal_length" REAL /* Length of the sepal (in cm) */,
  "sepal_width" REAL /* Width of the sepal (in cm) */,
  "petal_length" REAL /* Length of the petal (in cm) */,
  "petal_width" REAL /* Width of the petal (in cm) */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species classification */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was collected */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who collected the data */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations during the collection process */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iris_measurements_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES iris_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iris_measurements_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iris_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iris_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species (e.g., Iris Setosa) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species characteristics */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the location (in meters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement entry */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_images_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES iris_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each measurement entry
Reference to the location where the measurement was taken
Date when the measurement was collected
Reference to the researcher who collected the data
Additional notes or observations during the collection process
URL of the image of the plant
Name of the species (e.g., Iris Setosa)
